question.text: Under interoperability, a Clearing Member can be active with how many CCs per business segment at any point of time?

answer.text: Only one CC per business segment
Any number of CCs per business segment

explanation.text: **The Logic:** A CM can maintain membership with more than one CC but can be active with only one CC per business segment at any point of time. **The Trap:** Having membership with multiple CCs is allowed, but active designation is limited to one per segment. **Cross-Exam Context:** The per-segment designation is important for exam scenarios. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** A CM may choose different CCs for different business segments, providing flexibility.
